title: A001: Scaffold Go workspace and module structure
summary: Extracted shared controller-runtime manager bootstrap into internal/common/bootstrap package, eliminating duplication between keystone and c5c3 main.go files. Both operators now delegate to bootstrap.Run() with operator-specific ManagerConfig (Scheme, LeaderElectionID, SetupFunc). Validation logic is unit-tested. Dependencies in go.mod files are resolved via go mod tidy against real versions (no unusual pseudo-versions). All modules build, vet, lint, and test cleanly.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (4 unit tests for ManagerConfig.validate)
Edge cases covered (nil Scheme, empty LeaderElectionID)
Error cases tested with exact message assertions
Valid config path tested (with and without SetupFunc)

code_quality_checklist.item: No dead code or unused imports
SPDX license headers on all new files
Feature ID (CC-0001) annotated on all public types/functions

security_checklist.item: No injection vectors (standard flag parsing only)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
Shared bootstrap prevents drift across operators
ManagerConfig is extensible for future operators without modifying bootstrap
SetupFunc callback preserves operator-specific controller registration
Kubebuilder scaffold markers preserved in correct locations

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No speculative features added to ManagerConfig
Bootstrap package contains only what is needed now

fail_fast_checklist.item: Validation errors returned before manager creation
Each bootstrap step returns wrapped errors with context
os.Exit(1) on unrecoverable errors in main()

issues_found.description: No integration test for bootstrap.Run() — only validate() is tested. Run() requires a kubeconfig (envtest) which is out of scope for S001 scaffold phase and planned under S002. Acceptable for current phase.
issues_found.fix: Add envtest-based integration test for Run() when S002 (test infrastructure) is implemented.

issues_found.description: Running go mod tidy adds 2 missing /go.mod hash lines (k8s.io/api v0.35.1/go.mod, k8s.io/client-go v0.35.1/go.mod). The existing go.sum works correctly — these are supplementary hash entries that vary by Go toolchain version. Does not affect build or resolution.
issues_found.fix: Re-run go mod tidy -C internal/common and commit the updated go.sum if desired.

suggested_improvements: When S002 (test infrastructure) is implemented, add an envtest-based integration test for bootstrap.Run() to validate the full manager lifecycle.
next_steps: Merge this branch — all blocking and major checks pass.
S002: Set up envtest infrastructure, then add integration tests for bootstrap.Run().
S013: When adding reconcilers, extend SetupFunc usage in each operator's main.go.

detected_patterns.name: Operator entrypoint via shared bootstrap
detected_patterns.applies_when: Adding a new operator to the monorepo (e.g., glance, nova, neutron)
detected_patterns.description: Every operator main.go follows an identical structure: package-level scheme var, init() with clientgoscheme.AddToScheme + kubebuilder scaffold:scheme marker, main() calling bootstrap.Run(bootstrap.ManagerConfig{...}) with operator-specific Scheme, LeaderElectionID, and SetupFunc. Error handling logs via ctrl.Log.WithName("setup").Error() then os.Exit(1). The bootstrap package centralises flag parsing, zap logging, metrics, health probes, and manager lifecycle — operators only provide configuration.
